name: @ai-sdk-tool/tui
description: Terminal UI components for building interactive agent sessions. Provides streaming text rendering, tool call displays, a spinner, ANSI color helpers, and a full interactive TUI loop built on [`@mariozechner/pi-tui`](https://github.com/mariozechner/pi-tui)
